content.fact: After the Chamber resolution, the basilisk is defeated, the diary is destroyed, Ginny is rescued, and Dobby can be freed through Lucius’s mistake.
content.injection: After the Chamber resolution, the basilisk is defeated, the diary is destroyed, Ginny is rescued, and Dobby can be freed through Lucius’s mistake. Block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Do not keep the Year 2 Chamber crisis unresolved after this event unless our story has established a different outcome.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Chamber of Secrets: Year 2; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
antiLore: Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.

temporalTightening.method: curated chronology point event: validFrom plus 10 days
temporalTightening.notes: End date narrowed so event-like lore does not remain active as an open-ended suggestion.
